headline: Jim Cramer Believes “GE Vernova Is Absolutely Terrific”
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) was among the stocks Jim Cramer was focused on, as he discussed Mad Money’s latest game plan for the week. When a caller inquired about the stock during the episode, Cramer said: Look, I think GE Vernova is absolutely terrific. We know that the, it’s come down nicely from its top. […]

headline: Jim Cramer Responds to Investor With 60% of Portfolio in NVIDIA
summary: On the May 29, 2026 episode of Mad Money, a caller named Patrick from Virginia brought Jim Cramer a problem most investors would love to have. He bought NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) back in 2017 when Jim Cramer called it “the stock of our generation,” and over the next eight years, the position grew to roughly 60% ... Jim Cramer Responds to Investor With 60% of Portfolio in NVIDIA

headline: Peter Bergan Joins Vinson & Elkins as Real Estate Partner
summary: By Karen Roman Vinson & Elkins said it hired Peter C. Bergan, Jr. to join the Real Estate Industry practice as a New York-based partner, having previously served at Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe. Mr. Bergan has over a decade of experience in data center assets and their full lifecycle including construction, M&A, and leasing, the […] The post Peter Bergan Joins Vinson & Elkins as Real Estate Partner appeared first on CorpGov.

headline: EXCLUSIVE: 'The US Grid Is 40 Years Old': Tema ETFs CIO Says AI Is Accelerating Historic Infrastructure Upgrade Cycle
summary: Tema ETFs CIO Yuri Khodjamirian explains why AI's power needs are creating a multi-year electrification opportunity.

headline: MIT bullish on its Initiative for New Manufacturing at the one-year mark
summary: The group has been funding research projects, touring factories and piloting workforce development programs. Its three co-directors shared highlights during recent events in Boston and Cambridge.
